title: Free-text questions and PII risk
description: text (single line) and comment (multi-line). Free-text answers route by pii_risk: 'high' (the default) is kept out of the marts value_text and copied to the PII store for review; 'low' requires an explicit rationale and reaches value_text directly.

elements.name: role_description
elements.title: Describe your role in your own words.
elements.description: No pii_risk set, so it defaults to 'high' — free text about a person is treated as identifying until a human says otherwise. Never downgrade because the prompt 'looks innocuous'.

elements.name: favorite_color
elements.title: What is your favorite color?
elements.description: Downgraded to 'low' with a rationale, so the publish gate accepts it and the answer reaches marts.value_text. The rationale is the researcher's recorded judgment, not a heuristic.
elements.pii_risk_rationale: A single colour word carries no identifying information; safe to surface in the warehouse.
